query_normalized: imaginative perception tokens enhance spatial reasoning in multimodal language models computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) same-mechanism evidence and (b) independent/dependent variable on the same domain: it studies intermediate representations ("visual thoughts") that enhance reasoning in multimodal language models, which is the same mechanism and domain as the user's question about "Imaginative Perception Tokens" enhancing spatial reasoning in multimodal models, even though the specific terminology differs.
